funFacts: Prehistoric Sky Pterodactyls was a genus of pterosaurs (flying reptiles) that lived during the Late Jurassic epoch.
Designed for Hard difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing color harmony and edge precision using fine-tip gel pens.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about marine habitats and ocean conservation while developing fine motor coordination.
